headers.Subject: URGENT Action Required: Your Transaction has been Blocked
headers.Authentication-Results: mx.example.com; spf=fail smtp.mail=alert-no-reply@secure-finance-portal.xyz; dkim=fail header.d=secure-finance-portal.xyz; dmarc=fail (p=REJECT sp=REJECT) header.from=secure-finance-portal.xyz

body.plain_text:
Dear Account Holder,

Our system has detected a high-risk, unauthorized transaction attempt from an unknown location.

To prevent further fraud, we have temporarily frozen your funds and suspended all activity.

Click the link below IMMEDIATELY to verify your identity and confirm the transaction details:

http://verification-required-999.com/unlock-account?id=user@example.com

Failure to comply within 3 hours will result in a permanent block of your account.

Security Department
body.html:
Dear Account Holder,

Our system has detected a high-risk, unauthorized transaction attempt from an unknown location.

To prevent further fraud, we have temporarily frozen your funds and suspended all activity.

Click the link below IMMEDIATELY to verify your identity and confirm the transaction details:

Verify Account Now (Secure Link)

Failure to comply within 3 hours will result in a permanent block of your account.
